name: claw
description: Claude Code Multi-User Platform - Dockerless Edition

scripts.build: tsc && node --input-type=module -e "import fs from 'fs'; import path from 'path'; if (!fs.existsSync('./dist/agent-runner-v2/index.js')) { console.error('Missing dist/agent-runner-v2/index.js'); process.exit(1); } const srcPrompts = 'src/agent-runner-v2/prompts'; const dstPrompts = 'dist/agent-runner-v2/prompts'; if (fs.existsSync(srcPrompts)) { fs.cpSync(srcPrompts, dstPrompts, { recursive: true, force: true }); } console.log('Runner build OK');"
